particulars.description: As a continuing security for the payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, the borrower with full title guarantee charges to the lender a first legal mortgage over land apartment 17, the park octagon 141-143 derby road nottingham NG7 1AF as registered under title NT401834; and a first fixed charge. For more details please refer to the instrument.
